A2300 Assessment Reference Date DATE 8 This column contains the end date of the observation period of the assessment.
83 A2400A_MDCR_STAY_CD A2400A_MDCR_STAY_CD A2400A Has Resident Had a Medicare Stay Code Since Most Recent Admission CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies if the resident has had a Medicare-covered stay since the most recent entry. 0=No
1=Yes
